person.name: Gwladys ferch Llywarch
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography
Marriage and Issue«/b»
Owain Gwynedd (the second son of Gruffudd ap Cynan, Prince of Gwynedd and Angharad ferch Owain, the daughter of Owain ab Edwin of Tegeingl) was born around the year 1080, probably on the Isle of Anglesey, which his father had established as his power base. died in 1170, despite having been excommunicated, he was interred in Bangor Cathedral. After his death, civil war broke out between his sons. 

Owain was married twice, his first wife Gwladys ferch Llywarch ap Trahaearn, was the mother of two of his sons,

1.) Maelgwn ab Owain Gwynedd

2.) Iorwerth Drwyndwn, the father of Llywelyn the Great

by Christina, his second wife he had three sons including

1.) Dafydd ab Owain Gwynedd

2.) Rhodri ab Owain Gwynedd.

He also had a number of illegitimate sons, who by Welsh law had an equal claim on the inheritance if acknowledged by their father.

Iorwerth ab Owain Gwynedd (or Iorwerth Drwyndwn), also called Edward (1145-1174), meaning "the broken-nosed", was the eldest legitimate son of Owain Gwynedd (the king of Gwynedd) and his first wife Gwladys (Gladys) ferch Llywarch.

«b»Parents and Siblings«/b»
Llywarch, the eldest son, had issue by Dyddgw, his wife, daughter of Idnerth ab Cadwgan ab Elystan, three sons and two daughters. The sons were:

1.) Robert, ancestor of the Lords of Cedewain

2.) Meredydd

3.) Iorwerth

4.) Gwladys, consort of Prince Owain Gwynedd, by whom he had issue, Iorwerth Drwyndwn, Prince of Wales, Cynan, Maelgwn, Gwladys, and Gwenllian, wife of Owain Cyfeilioc

5.) Mabli, wife of Ieuaf ab Niniaf ab Cynric ab Rhiwallon ab Dingad ab Tudor Trefor. According to the Golden Grove Book, Eva, the daughter of Adda, son of this Ieuaf (or Adda ab Awr ab Ieuaf), was wife of Ieuaf ab Cuhelyn ab Rhyn ab Einion Evell.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwladys ferch Llywarch於1098年出生在英國威爾斯蒙格莫利夏爾時，她的父親Llywarch ap Trahaearn28歲，母親Dyddgu verch Iorwerth48歲。她於1124年與Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1155年在她的家鄉享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Gwladys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old form of   Gladys  , of uncertain derivation.

en.lifeSummary: When Gwladys ferch Llywarch was born in 1098, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Llywarch ap Trahaearn, was 28 and her mother, Dyddgu verch Iorwerth, was 48. She married Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales in 1124, in Montgomeryshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1155, in her hometown, at the age of 57.

fr.Caernarfon, Caernarvonshire, Wales: Caernarfon, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwladys ferch Llywarch est née en 1098, à Montgomeryshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Llywarch ap Trahaearn, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Dyddgu verch Iorwerth, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales en 1124, à Montgomeryshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1155, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwladys ferch Llywarch 1098 in Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Llywarch ap Trahaearn 28 und ihre Mutter Dyddgu verch Iorwerth 48. Sie hat 1124 in Montgomeryshire, Wales Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1155 im Alter von 57 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladys ferch Llywarch è nata il nel 1098 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, Regno Unito, sua padre, Llywarch ap Trahaearn, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Dyddgu verch Iorwerth, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales nel 1124, nel Montgomeryshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1155, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwladys ferch Llywarchが1098年にイギリスウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父Llywarch ap Trahaearnは28歳，母Dyddgu verch Iorwerthは48歳であった。1124年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアでOwain Gwynedd King of all Walesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1155年に故郷で57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwladys ferch Llywarch(이)가 1098년 영국 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Llywarch ap Trahaearn(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dyddgu verch Iorwerth(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 1124년 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1155년 그녀의 고향에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwladys ferch Llywarch nasceu em 1098, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Llywarch ap Trahaearn, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Dyddgu verch Iorwerth, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales em 1124, em Montgomeryshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1155, em sua cidade natal, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwladys ferch Llywarch родилась в 1098 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Llywarch ap Trahaearn было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Dyddgu verch Iorwerth, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales в 1124 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1155 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwladys ferch Llywarch nació en 1098, en Montgomeryshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Llywarch ap Trahaearn, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Dyddgu verch Iorwerth, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Owain Gwynedd King of all Wales en 1124, en Montgomeryshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1155, en su pueblo, a la edad de 57 años.
